command:
BASE="http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent"

for test in "router info" "router health" "docker module" "filesystem module"; do
  echo "=== TEST: $test ==="
  curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"message\":\"$test\"}" -o /tmp/test_out.json
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
d=json.load(open('/tmp/test_out.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
sent=d.get('sentinel',{})
sr=d.get('sentinel_result','MISSING')
print(f'  sentinel.enabled : {sent.get(\"enabled\")}')
print(f'  sentinel.phase   : {sent.get(\"phase\")}')
print(f'  sentinel.mode    : {sent.get(\"mode\")}')
print(f'  sentinel.result  : {sent.get(\"result\")}')
print(f'  sentinel_result  : {sr}')
ok = sent.get('enabled')==True and sent.get('result')=='PASS' and sent.get('phase')=='8H'
print(f'  STATUS: {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL\"}')"
  echo ""
done

echo "=== FINAL SUMMARY ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
results = []
tests = ['router info','router health','docker module','filesystem module']
for t in tests:
  req = urllib.request.Request('http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent',
    data=json.dumps({'message':t}).encode(), method='POST',
    headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'})
  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r:
    d = json.loads(r.read())
  if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
  sent=d.get('sentinel',{})
  ok = sent.get('enabled')==True and sent.get('result')=='PASS' and sent.get('phase')=='8H'
  results.append(ok)
  print(f'  {t:30s} -> {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL\"}')
print()
print(f'  All tests PASS: {all(results)}')
print(f'  Phase 8H Complete: {all(results)}')
"
